title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: 98th Academy Awards
text: IndieWire provides comprehensive predictions for the 2026 Academy Awards across all major categories. The coverage emphasizes that this year's race lacks a single dominant frontrunner, creating unpredictability throughout the competition. Best Picture: One Battle After Another leads predictions, followed by Sinners, Hamnet, and Sentimental Value. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson (One Battle After Another) tops the field ahead of Ryan Coogler and Joachim Trier. Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) is positioned as the strongest contender, with support from major acting awards. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet) is described as arguably the easiest category to predict. Notable Observations: The article notes that Sinners has secured wins in Original Screenplay, Original Score, and Casting across major award ceremonies. Meanwhile, One Battle After Another dominates craft categories like cinematography, editing, and adapted screenplay. The piece emphasizes that anything can happen, with margins described as razor thin despite apparent dominance by certain films. The writer highlights voter unpredictability, particularly within the substantial Actors Branch. The analysis includes sections on animated features, craft categories, and short films, with predictions updated throughout the awards season via IndieWire's The Lead Up newsletter.
